title: Double Prong Coat Hook Robe Hooks Dual Coat Hooks Wall Mounted Hanging Clothes Metal Door Hooks for Bathroom Bedrooms Hanging Clothes Robe Towel Kitchen (Sliver) - 4PCS
features: 【Material】These heavy-duty dual robe hooks are made of good quality zinc die-cast material, the screws are made of iron, sturdy and durable, and not easy to produce scratches, long service life.
【Quantity】Comes with 4 pcs Double Prong Robe hooks and 8 pcs screws,total 12 pcs,one hook for two screws,match each other well,enough for long lasting using life.
【Double Hooks】They features double prong hook, strong enough to hold more things. And it is recommended to install on solid wood or wooden surfaces.
【Easy Installation】: First place the chrome retro clothes hanger where you like, then you could use a screwdriver to mount 2 screws into the correspondent holes.

【Functional & Versatile】Chrome dual door hooks will provide you with extra storage space exactly where you need it. It can hold a variety of accessories - hanging towel, bath ball, bath brush, mirror, coffee cup, food clip shovel, baking kitchenware, shirt, cap.
description: Product Description Specifications: Coat Hooks Material: Zinc Alloy Size: 53 x 41 mm/ 2.09 x 1.61 inches Package includes: 4 x Metal Dual Coat Hooks 8 x Metal Screws Feature: Retro hooks style - Retro hooks style,double prong robe design.These hooks are in bronze color,smooth surface.Outstanding styles are compatible with your home decor. Multiple applications - You can use these hooks in different places,such as bathrooms,bedrooms,closets,garage,basement,entryway and so on,to hang various items,such as key,dresses,clothes,towels,hats and so on. Easy to install - Each hook has 2 holes,can be reinforced with two screws,the hooks and the screws match each other well.
